component.name: php-spojenet-abo-parser
component.summary: Czechoslovak ABO format parsing library for PHP

description.p: This library provides a parser for Czechoslovak ABO (Account Bank Output) format files, which are commonly used for bank statement processing in Czech Republic and Slovakia. The library includes: - AboParser class for parsing ABO files - Support for 074 and 075 record types - Proper character encoding handling for Czech/Slovak text - Command-line tools for ABO to JSON conversion - Full PSR-4 autoloading support
